<?php namespace Http\Message\Encoding\Filter; /** * Userland implementation of the chunk stream filter. * * @author Joel Wurtz <joel.wurtz@gmail.com> */ class Chunk extends \php_user_filter { public function filter($in, $out, &$consumed, $closing): int { while ($bucket = stream_bucket_make_writeable($in)) { $lenbucket = stream_bucket_new($this->stream, dechex($bucket->datalen)."\r\n"); stream_bucket_append($out, $lenbucket); $consumed += $bucket->datalen; stream_bucket_append($out, $bucket); $lenbucket = stream_bucket_new($this->stream, "\r\n"); stream_bucket_append($out, $lenbucket); } return PSFS_PASS_ON; } }
